expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
expectations.evidence: importmap with three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js from jsdelivr found

expectations.text: Scene uses PlaneGeometry or similar for terrain mesh
expectations.evidence: new THREE.PlaneGeometry(size, size, resolution, resolution) called

expectations.text: Vertices are displaced to create terrain height variation
expectations.evidence: fbm() noise function used to displace Y positions of each vertex in a loop

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
Right panel has a roughness control
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='roughness' min=0.1 max=1.0 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a height scale control
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='height-scale' min=0.5 max=10 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a color scheme selector with at least desert/arctic/forest
expectations.evidence: select#color-scheme with options: forest, desert, arctic, volcanic, alien

expectations.text: Right panel has a Regenerate button
expectations.evidence: button id='regenerate-btn' with click handler calling reseed() then generate()

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
